name: @harness/hard-limits
description: ISSUE-055 — the code half of the seven hard limits (C6 Guardrails HRD; FR-6.HRD.001–004 / NFR-SEC.004/005 / ADR-007). A pure, un-overridable, fail-closed classifier for the seven autonomous prohibitions; the HardLimitGate port + in-memory fake reference model that writes a guardrail_log row (type hard_limit) on every hit, holds the block even when the row write or the alert fails, refuses any status→approved on a hard_limit row (mirrors the schema check not(hard_limit and approved)), rejects at save any agent definition granting Comms-send / Finance-transact / non-Memory-Agent memory-write, and routes any new dangerous capability to hard-approval + a rate cap (never an eighth limit). supabase-store.ts is the live pg adapter authored to the schema.md §7 DDL — NOT run live (the CHECK/trigger live proof is the Stage-3 capstone; the AF-068 red-team against the running system is ISSUE-003's live proof).
